targets.rawSql:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN max(fecha_hora) >= now() - INTERVAL '30 minutes' THEN 1 
    ELSE 0 
  END as estado
FROM datos_rem_temp
WHERE id_estacion = 85;

SELECT
  temperatura AS "value"
FROM datos_rem_temp
WHERE id_estacion = 85
ORDER BY fecha_hora DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT humedad as "value" 
FROM datos_rem_temp 
WHERE id_estacion = 85 
ORDER BY fecha_hora DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT (viento_velocidad * 3.6) 
FROM datos_rem_temp 
WHERE id_estacion = 85 
ORDER BY fecha_hora DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
  viento_direccion AS "value" 
FROM 
  datos_rem_temp 
WHERE 
  id_estacion = 85 
ORDER BY 
  fecha_hora DESC 
LIMIT 1;

SELECT temperatura_predicha FROM predicciones_temperatura WHERE id_estacion = 85 AND modelo = 1 AND horizonte = 1 AND fecha_generacion = (SELECT MAX(fecha_generacion) FROM predicciones_temperatura WHERE id_estacion = 85 AND modelo = 1) LIMIT 1;

SELECT temperatura_predicha FROM predicciones_temperatura WHERE id_estacion = 85 AND modelo = 1 AND horizonte = 2 AND fecha_generacion = (SELECT MAX(fecha_generacion) FROM predicciones_temperatura WHERE id_estacion = 85 AND modelo = 1) LIMIT 1;

SELECT temperatura_predicha FROM predicciones_temperatura WHERE id_estacion = 85 AND modelo = 1 AND horizonte = 3 AND fecha_generacion = (SELECT MAX(fecha_generacion) FROM predicciones_temperatura WHERE id_estacion = 85 AND modelo = 1) LIMIT 1;

SELECT temperatura_predicha FROM predicciones_temperatura WHERE id_estacion = 85 AND modelo = 1 AND horizonte = 4 AND fecha_generacion = (SELECT MAX(fecha_generacion) FROM predicciones_temperatura WHERE id_estacion = 85 AND modelo = 1) LIMIT 1;

SELECT temperatura_predicha FROM predicciones_temperatura WHERE id_estacion = 85 AND modelo = 1 AND horizonte = 5 AND fecha_generacion = (SELECT MAX(fecha_generacion) FROM predicciones_temperatura WHERE id_estacion = 85 AND modelo = 1) LIMIT 1;

SELECT temperatura_predicha FROM predicciones_temperatura WHERE id_estacion = 85 AND modelo = 1 AND horizonte = 6 AND fecha_generacion = (SELECT MAX(fecha_generacion) FROM predicciones_temperatura WHERE id_estacion = 85 AND modelo = 1) LIMIT 1;

WITH alerta_reciente AS (
  SELECT 
    '⚠️ ALERTA (' || TO_CHAR(fecha_hora_alerta, 'HH24:MI') || 'h)' as estado,
    ROUND(velocidad_viento * 3.6, 1) || ' km/h' as velocidad
  FROM alertas_viento 
  WHERE id_estacion = 22 
    AND fecha_hora_alerta >= (NOW() - INTERVAL '12 hours')
  ORDER BY fecha_hora_alerta DESC 
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT estado, velocidad FROM alerta_reciente
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SIN ALERTA', ''
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM alerta_reciente)
LIMIT 1;

(
    SELECT 
        '⚠️ ALERTA (' || TO_CHAR(fecha_hora_alerta, 'HH24:MI') || 'h)' as "E", 
        ROUND(velocidad_viento * 3.6, 1) || ' km/h' as "V"
    FROM alertas_viento
    WHERE id_estacion IN (26, 52, 14)
      AND fecha_hora_alerta >= NOW() - INTERVAL '12 hours'
    ORDER BY fecha_hora_alerta DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SIN ALERTA', ''
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM alertas_viento
    WHERE id_estacion IN (26, 52, 14)
      AND fecha_hora_alerta >= NOW() - INTERVAL '12 hours'
)
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
    fecha_pronostico AS time,
    temperatura_predicha AS "Modelo 1"
FROM predicciones_temperatura
WHERE id_estacion = 85
  AND modelo = 1
  AND fecha_generacion = (
      SELECT MAX(fecha_generacion) FROM predicciones_temperatura
      WHERE id_estacion = 85 AND modelo = 1
  )
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT
  fecha_hora AT TIME ZONE 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires' AS "time",
  temperatura AS "Temp Historico",
  'Temperatura Real' AS "metric"
FROM public.datos_rem 
WHERE id_estacion = 85 
  AND $__timeFilter(fecha_hora)
ORDER BY fecha_hora ASC;

SELECT
  fecha_hora AT TIME ZONE 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires' AS "time",
  temperatura AS "Temp Actual",
  'Temp Real (10 min)' AS "metric"
FROM datos_rem_temp
WHERE id_estacion = 85
  -- La magia está aquí: Solo trae datos mayores al último registro de la tabla por hora
  AND fecha_hora > (SELECT MAX(fecha_hora) FROM public.datos_rem WHERE id_estacion = 85)
  AND $__timeFilter(fecha_hora)
ORDER BY fecha_hora ASC;

SELECT
    fecha_pronostico AS time,
    temperatura_predicha AS "Modelo 3"
FROM predicciones_temperatura
WHERE id_estacion = 85
  AND modelo = 3
  AND fecha_generacion = (
      SELECT MAX(fecha_generacion) FROM predicciones_temperatura
      WHERE id_estacion = 85 AND modelo = 3
  )
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT 
  fecha_inicio_analogo 
FROM 
  analogos_temperatura 
WHERE 
  rank_analogo = 1
ORDER BY 
  fecha_generacion DESC 
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
    fecha_generacion + (hora_ventana * INTERVAL '1 hour') 
        - (360 * INTERVAL '1 hour') AS time,
    temp_actual AS "Ventana Actual",
    temp_analogo AS "Análogo 1"
FROM analogos_temperatura
WHERE id_estacion = 85
  AND rank_analogo = 1
  AND fecha_generacion = (
      SELECT MAX(fecha_generacion)
      FROM analogos_temperatura
      WHERE id_estacion = 85
  )
ORDER BY hora_ventana ASC
